source_authority: ja.json = JP primary; EN asset = structural authority (EN-asset-is-English case, en.json non-empty English)
notes: Title 'Melting Ice'/'溶け出す氷' -> 'Băng Đang Tan Chảy' (Vietnamese Title Case).
messageTextCenter '――数時間後' -> '——Vài Giờ Sau' (Title Case, no ASCII comma).
Sylvia: haughty ojou-sama isekai noble; わたくし/ですわ voice -> polite-formal 'tôi', addresses Commander as 'anh'; softens by scene end.
Commander (<user>, 俺): male; addresses Sylvia as 'cô'; 大穴 -> 'Đại Huyệt'; 前線基地 -> 'Căn Cứ Tiền Tuyến'.
Name in narration/dialogue romanized 'Sylvia' (matches en.json/asset); speaker label field kept byte-identical (シルヴィア/モンスター).
Placeholders %user% and <user> preserved. SFX/interjections localized (きゃっ->Kyaa, ギギャァ->Ghhya, ぐすっ->Sụt sịt).

All in-text ASCII commas written as U+201A;
counts mirror EN asset exactly (0 tag mismatches).
